title: Zhuangzi: Cook Ting Carves an Ox
description: Cook Ting moves his knife through the spaces in the joints, never touching bone — the art of following the natural grain.
introduction: Cook Ting moves his knife through the spaces in the joints, never touching bone — the art of following the natural grain.

translation.text: I follow the natural structure, strike the big hollows, guide the knife through the big openings. A good cook changes his knife once a year. I have used this knife for nineteen years and it is still as sharp as new.
